articles.title: Yen’s Purchasing Power Falls to One-Third Over 30 Years
articles.snippet: As price hikes spread from fast food to daily necessities and households grapple with rising living costs, the steady depreciation of the yen has emerged as a central driver of inflation, with multiple indicators showing that the currency’s purchasing power h…
